# Lessons

Durable engineering notes. Phase-by-phase closure narratives live in `reports/phase*.md` and `.lab/memory/extended/phase*.md`.

## Imports and CI fences

- Prefer `from mythosunwritten.llm.stub import StubProvider` when tests must avoid pulling `httpx`. Package `from mythosunwritten.llm import ‚Ä¶` runs `llm/__init__.py` and eagerly loads backends.
- `import mythosunwritten.sim` must not load `agents` or `httpx` on default CI paths. Extend `tests/test_client_imports.py` when adding `client.*` modules.
- **`run_pyglet_visual_client.py` (Phases 90, 94, 110‚Äì111):** Default-off `pyglet_wait_*` / `pyglet_say_*` (keys `,` / `.` vs trade `t`/`y`/`n`/`v`). `on_draw`: **`pyglet_maybe_dispatch_revise_trade_on_key_rising`** then **`pyglet_maybe_dispatch_accept_trade_on_key_rising`** (same-frame **`v`** then **`y`** applies revised terms then commits) **before** **`build_client_world_snapshot`**, then **`drop_item`‚Üí`give_item`‚Üí`examine`‚Üí`interact`‚Üí`wait`‚Üí`say`**; HUD `pyglet_wait_say_hud_block_for_world` after `interact`. **Phase 110 (2026-04-15):** default **`CONFIG`** can **`pyglet_maybe_open_demo_trade_on_start`** with **`pyglet_demo_trade_opener`** **`npc`** + **`pyglet_trade_demo_propose_*_gold`** so hero may **`v`** revise with **`pyglet_trade_revise_*_gold`** ‚Üí **`trade_revised`**; offline **`test_pyglet_phase110_*`** in **`tests/test_run_pyglet_visual_client_config.py`**. **Phase 111 (closed **2026-04-15**; **Slices B‚ÄìE**):** CONFIG **`pyglet_trade_accept_dispatch_enabled`** + **`pyglet_trade_accept_engine_key`** (default **`y`**) ‚Üí **`pyglet_maybe_dispatch_accept_trade*`**; **`trade_accepted`** uses **Phase 74** omit-zero gold keys from the pending row; offline **`test_pyglet_phase111_*`** / **`test_pyglet_maybe_dispatch_accept_trade_*`**. ADR **`.lab/memory/extended/phase111_pyglet_accept_trade_after_revise_currency_v0.md`**. `tests/test_run_pyglet_visual_client_config.py`: indent-prefixed `find` guards so `def pyglet_maybe_dispatch_*` does not false-match `on_draw` call sites.
- **HUD formatters:** `wait_say_hud_format`, `interact_hud_format`, `examine_hud_format` ‚Äî same tail pattern; optional `actor_entity_id` when `events_tail` mixes locals. **`interact`:** default key **`i`**; pass current snapshot into rising-edge dispatchers. **`default_interact_item_id_*`** = **`default_drop_item_id_*`** (`inventory_drop_item_id`).
- **`client/trade_hud_format` ‚Äî Phase 111:** `format_trade_hud_lines` scans reversed snapshot `events_tail` for `trade_revised` then `trade_accepted`. **`format_trade_accepted_event_line`** mirrors **`format_trade_revised_event_line`** (compact `tid=` / `by=` from event **`entity_id`**, else payload **`to_entity_id`**) with **Phase 74** **`+Ng`** on items when currency HUD is on; **`tests/test_client_trade_hud_format.py`** + **`test_pyglet_phase111_propose_revise_accept_emits_trade_accepted_with_gold`** HUD blob.
- **Vertical stub LLM overlays (81+):** `run_headless_events` / injected `npc_llm_client`; subprocess tests assert no `httpx` / package `mythosunwritten.llm`; goldens vs frozen dispatcher payloads (e.g. Phase 91 `entity_interacted`, Phase 95 directed `say`, Phase 96 `ability_check_resolved` vs Phase 20 harness row ‚Äî `seq`/`tick` may be stream-specific). **Phase 101** **Slice B** (**2026-04-15**): **`tests/test_vertical_play_stub_npc_equip_use_item_llm_overlay_phase101.py`** ‚Äî two-tick **`equip`** then **`use_item`** ‚Üí **`item_equipped`** / **`item_used`** (`headless_demo_npc_current_hp` **25** vs **max_hp** **30** so **`minor_salve`** logs **`heal`** **5**); module-doc pointer in **`scripts/run_vertical_play_stub.py`**. **Phase 102** **Slice B** (**2026-04-15**): **`tests/test_vertical_play_stub_npc_drop_item_llm_overlay_phase102.py`** ‚Äî one-tick **`drop_item`** ‚Üí **`item_dropped`** (**`seq`** **5**, **`tick`** **1**, **Phase 66** payload freeze) + subprocess fence; module-doc pointer in **`run_vertical_play_stub.py`**. **Phase 103** **Slice B** (**2026-04-15**): **`headless_demo_npc_ground_stack`** seeds **`World.ground_items`** on the demo NPC tile in **`run_loop.run_headless`**; **`tests/test_vertical_play_stub_npc_pick_up_llm_overlay_phase103.py`** ‚Äî **`pick_up`** ‚Üí **`item_picked_up`** (**`seq`** **5**, **`tick`** **1**, **Phase 67** payload) + subprocess fence. **Phase 104** **Slice B** (**2026-04-15**): **`tests/test_vertical_play_stub_npc_propose_accept_trade_llm_overlay_phase104.py`** ‚Äî hero **`headless_demo_hero_propose_trade_*`** + two-tick injected client (**`wait`** then **`accept_trade`** **`trade_id`** **1**) ‚Üí **`trade_proposed`** (**`seq`** **5** / tick **1**) + **`trade_accepted`** (**`seq`** **11** / tick **2**); **Phase 69**/**81** payload freeze + subprocess fence; module-doc in **`run_vertical_play_stub.py`**. **Phase 105** **Slice B** (**2026-04-15**): **`tests/test_vertical_play_stub_npc_deny_trade_llm_overlay_phase105.py`** ‚Äî same hero propose hook + two-tick client (**`wait`** then **`deny_trade`** **`trade_id`** **1**) ‚Üí **`trade_proposed`** + voluntary **`trade_denied`** (**`seq`** **11** / tick **2**, four-key payload **`reason`:** **`"denied"`** per **`dispatcher.py`**); **Phase 104**-class subprocess fence; module-doc in **`run_vertical_play_stub.py`**. **Phase 106** **Slices B‚ÄìD** (**2026-04-15**): **`tests/test_vertical_play_stub_npc_trade_currency_llm_overlay_phase106.py`** ‚Äî **Phase 104** two-tick overlay + **`headless_demo_hero_gold`** / **`headless_demo_npc_gold`** + non-zero **`give_gold`** / **`want_gold`** on **`headless_demo_hero_propose_trade_payload`** ‚Üí **`trade_proposed`** / **`trade_accepted`** with **Phase 74** payload keys (**`seq`** **5** / **11** unchanged vs barter-only **104**); subprocess fence; module-doc in **`run_vertical_play_stub.py`**; ADR **¬ß Reviewer** + **¬ß Reporter sign-off**; closure **`reports/phase106_vertical_stub_npc_trade_currency_llm_overlay_v0.md`**. **Phase 107** **Slices B‚ÄìD** (**2026-04-15**): **`tests/test_vertical_play_stub_npc_deny_trade_currency_llm_overlay_phase107.py`** ‚Äî **Phase 106**-class gold + propose payload + two-tick client (**`wait`** then **`deny_trade`**) ‚Üí **`trade_proposed`** with **`give_gold`**/**`want_gold`** + voluntary **`trade_denied`** (**Phase 105** four-key payload); - **`build_npc_observation` ‚Äî Phase 92 `interact:` / Phase 97 `freeform_ability:` / Phase 98 `move:`/`attack:`/`end_turn:` / Phase 99‚Äì100 inventory tails:** exploration lines mirror `dispatcher.py` reason tokens; encounter blocks may omit payload sub-lines where tests freeze that contract; `npc_system.md` + `tests/test_npc_prompt_skeleton.py` phase anchors. **Phase 108 (2026-04-15):** pending / `recent_trade_events` use **` +Ng`** after item ids when gold keys non-zero (omit-zero vs dispatcher); exploration **`trade_gold_afford:`** per pending row (`role=counterparty` **`need=`** / `role=proposer` **`hold=`** + **`inventory_has_*`** / **`gold_ge_*`** as lowercase bools); keep **`agents/observation.py`** **`sim`**-only imports (no `client.trade_hud_format` import). **Phase 98 Slice C:** `=== combat_movement_events ===` (capped `move` ok=true, `attack`, `damage_applied` as target, `action_failed` attack-only, `turn_begin`/`turn_end` on observer `entity_id`) after `ability_check_events`, before encounter `=== combat ===`; `legality_hint` cross-refs the band. **Phase 99 Slice C:** `=== inventory_item_events ===` (`item_picked_up`, `item_dropped`, `item_given`; **`item_given`** visible to giver and recipient) after `combat_movement_events`, before optional `combat`; `legality_hint` cross-refs. **Phase 100 Slice D:** same band adds **`recent_item_equipped:`** / **`recent_item_used:`** (`item_equipped` / `item_used` actor-filtered) + **`equip:`** / **`use_item:`** paragraphs in **`legality_hint`**; caps **`max_item_equipped_shown`** / **`max_item_used_shown`**. **Phase 99 Slice D:** **`npc_system.md`** inventory section documents **`pick_up:`** / **`drop_item:`** / **`give_item:`** plus the exact **`see === inventory_item_events === ‚Üí recent_item_*:`** strings from **`_append_legality_hint_lines`**; **`test_npc_prompt_skeleton_inventory_item_events_phase99_anchors`** locks band + legality cross-links + key tokens (**`in_combat`**, **`no_ground_item`**, **`item_mismatch`**, **`inventory_full`**). **Phase 100 Slice E:** extends **`npc_system.md`** for **`equip`/`use_item`** (**`item_equipped`**/**`item_used`**, **`see === inventory_item_events === ‚Üí recent_item_equipped:`** / **`recent_item_used:`**); **`test_npc_prompt_skeleton_inventory_item_events_phase100_anchors`**. Band order in injected text: `ability_check_events` ‚Üí `combat_movement_events` ‚Üí `inventory_item_events` ‚Üí optional `combat` ‚Üí `legality_hint`; keep **freeform_ability-specific validation** substring for Phase **97** skeleton test. Observation modules must not import `httpx` / package `llm`.
- **Phase 93 (Design 2 deferred):** eager removal of superseded `pending_trades` rows after `trade_denied` **`superseded`**; apply **`PENDING_TRADES_MAX`** after removal; `parent_trade_id` not mandatory v0 ‚Äî ADR `phase93_trade_counter_offer_design2_design_spike_v0.md`.
- **Current gating work:** **Phase 113** (**open**; ADR **`.lab/memory/extended/phase113_vertical_stub_npc_deny_trade_after_revise_llm_overlay_v0.md`** ‚Äî **Slices A‚ÄìC** **2026-04-15**; **next** **reporter** Slice **D**). **Latest closed flagship:** Phase **112** ‚Äî **892** passed, **2** skipped (**~2.98** s reporter re-verify, standard deselect, **`e89112f`**, **0** deselected); closure **`reports/phase112_vertical_stub_npc_accept_trade_after_revise_llm_overlay_v0.md`**. **Prior flagship:** Phase **111** ‚Äî **888** passed; closure **`reports/phase111_pyglet_accept_trade_after_revise_currency_v0.md`**.
- Keep `run_ability_check` / `parse_freeform_ability_payload` lazy inside the `freeform_ability` dispatcher branch to avoid partially initialized `sim` during package import.
- `pytest` uses `pythonpath` from `pyproject.toml`; scripts under `scripts/` prepend `src/` so `python scripts/‚Ä¶` works without `pip install -e`.

## Orchestrator (see ADR `phase31_orchestrator_docs_timing_hygiene.md`)

1. **`orchestrator_tool_batch` vs `orchestrator_tool_batches`:** `run_orchestrator_tick` reads only `orchestrator_tool_batch`. `run_headless` maps exploration invocations to `batches[min(n, len-1)]` via a shallow `dict(config)` overlay without mutating the caller‚Äôs config.
2. **Mutating tools:** `_tool_mutates_world` ‚Äî `spawn_npc`, `mutate_world_object`, and `narrate_world_patch` only when `state_patch` is non-empty. Narration-only rows do not consume per-tick mutator caps.
3. **Caps:** `orchestrator_max_mutating_tool_applies_per_tick` (per invocation) vs sliding window (`orchestrator_rate_limit_window_world_ticks` + `orchestrator_max_mutating_tool_applies_in_window`, both positive ints; reject bool). Phase 27 minimal stub vs Phase 28 vertical-stub overlay prove sliding-window behavior.
4. **Idempotency before caps:** replay short-circuits and does not increment caps or sliding-window ticks.
5. **`World.events` vs `World.orchestrator_audit`:** parallel streams; optional `headless_return_orchestrator_audit` for harness parity (`tests/test_vertical_play_stub_harness.py`).
6. **`scripts/orchestrator_smoke.py`:** emulates `run_headless` batch rotation because `run_orchestrator_tick` ignores `orchestrator_tool_batches`.

## Headless events helper (Phase 34‚Äì35)

- `run_headless_events(config)` returns `run_headless(config)["events"]` only. Use when no other return keys are needed; keep `run_headless` when using `lines`, `entity_ids`, or opt-in return flags.

## NPC planner (Phases 9, 17, 32, 36‚Äì39)

- Exploration order: `World.tick` ‚Üí local dispatches ‚Üí `run_npc_agent_step` ‚Üí optional scripted `attack` ‚Üí `run_orchestrator_tick` (Phase 17).
- `headless_return_npc_planner_metrics`: exploration-only counters at the Phase 17 NPC slot; combat NPC branch excluded.
- Async opt-in (`npc_planner_async_enabled`, Phase 36): `try_commit_pending_npc_deferred_planner` reasons include `stale_epoch`, `combat_cancelled`, `apply_failed`, `stale_event_seq`. With metrics enabled, `npc_planner_async_*` counters on the same dict; `commits_applied` only when deferred `dispatch_action` returns `ok: true`. `run_headless` refreshes deferred event baselines after locals and after orchestrator (Phase 39).
- Phase 65: `parse_validate_structured_npc_action_json` / `validate_structured_npc_action` accept optional `world=` so `attack` may omit a blank `item_id` (filled from `CharacterSheet.equipped_item_id`). Stub `run_npc_agent_step` uses the same `normalize_npc_attack_payload_item_id_from_equipped` helper as JSON validation and Pyglet `player_quick_attack` resolution.

## Rules and `rule_program_v0` (Phases 13 D, 41, 44‚Äì51)

- `World.active_rules` on `sim.world.World`; `evaluate_rules_tick` lazy-imported from `World.tick`; sorted `rule_id` iteration.
- Phase 41: optional `world_rules_event_volume_cap_enabled` + `world_rules_max_rule_events_per_tick` (positive int, not bool) caps combined `rule_tick` + `rule_triggered` per tick when passed via `rules_eval_config`.
- Phase 45‚Äì51: `RULE_KIND_RULE_PROGRAM_V0`, bounded opcodes (`noop`, `emit_trigger`, `emit_trigger_mod`, `emit_trigger_labeled`, `emit_trigger_mod_labeled`), lazy `world_rules_program_v0`; **`emit_trigger_labeled`** / **`emit_trigger_mod_labeled`** put the step‚Äôs normalized **`label`** (and optional **`tag`**) on **`rule_triggered`** with the same **Phase 41** cap path as **`emit_trigger`**. Modulus opcodes **`continue`** before the cap check when **`tick_index % mod != rem`** (no event, no **`used`** bump). **`emit_trigger_mod_labeled`** is the single-slot fusion for periodic labeled hooks (ADR **Phase 51**). `import mythosunwritten.sim` subprocess still omits the program runner module (`tests/test_imports.py`).
- Vertical harness overlays: `tests/test_vertical_play_stub_rule_program_v0.py`, `test_vertical_play_stub_phase43_overlay.py` ‚Äî prefer shallow `CONFIG` overlays; subprocess fences keep `httpx` / `mythosunwritten.llm` off default paths.

## Client / Ursina (Phases 11‚Äì12, 15, 18‚Äì19, 29)

- Ursina optional extra `[visual]`; `run_visual_client_app` lazy-imports Ursina. Thread `rules_eval_config`, `ability_check_config`, and `ability_check_rng` on every `dispatch_action` and exploration `World.tick` (Phase 15).
- Ursina **8.x:** `Ursina()` does not enter the blocking main loop; call `app.run()` (or `app.run(info=False)`) after setup so `scripts/run_visual_client.py` does not exit immediately rc 0 (Phase 49).
- **Phase 52 (macOS Core Profile):** Default Entity shaders (`#version 130/140`) can fail ‚Üí black geometry; grey fill often matches `window.color`. Fix path: `gl-version 3 2` before Ursina, bump all live `ursina.shader.Shader` sources to GLSL 150 (`gc.get_objects()` ‚Äî `imported_shaders` alone misses colliding `untitled_shader`), `reconcile_macos_ursina_glsl_after_window()` after `Ursina()` and again after `Text` / `_TickBridge` before `app.run()`. Triage: `reports/phase52_slice_b_visual_client_triage.md`.
- **Phase 53 (viewport truth ‚Äî see ADR + reports):** Use in-engine / window-scoped framebuffer capture, not desktop `screencapture`. Warm with `renderFrame()` before `base.screenshot`. Dual `invoke` timers: clamp second delay > first (`client.app`). Residual `130` stderr can be import-order: `camera` instantiates at `ursina` import time ‚Äî install `Shader.compile` wrap **before** any `from ursina import ‚Ä¶` in `run_visual_client_app`; Darwin `sys.meta_path` hook on `ursina.shader` may still be needed so `Camera()` sees wrapped compile. `glsl-version` PRC alone is inert on Panda 1.10.x for selection ‚Äî use `cg-glsl-version 150` + early `panda_darwin_visual_prc`; invalidate caches + refresh bindings when sources already read 150. Quiet stderr ‚âÝ visible framebuffer; minimal POC can stay black (`reports/phase53_slice_d_window_truth_experiment.md`, `run_ursina_minimal_shapes_poc` artifacts). Contingency: Panda3D direct, then Arcade/Pyglet ‚Äî user primary path ‚Üí **Pyglet** (Phase 54+).
- **Pyglet POC hygiene (Phase 54):** GL 3.3+ context; draw only in `Window.on_draw`; `app.run(interval=‚Ä¶)` for steady redraw; Retina: framebuffer size ‚âÝ window size. Research: `.lab/memory/extended/phase54_pyglet_macos_opengl_research.md`. Extra `[pyglet_visual]` pins `pyglet>=2.0.10`; `test_client_imports` keeps pyglet/ursina off default surface; Pyglet 2.x `clear()` ‚Äî use `glClearColor` then no-arg `window.clear()`; optional framebuffer PNG in reports. Closure: `reports/phase54_pyglet_visual_client_v0.md`. **Blue-only window:** blue usually means **clear succeeded**; if no rectangle/terrain appears, compare **`scripts/run_pyglet_visual_poc.py`** (known-good minimal draw) vs **`run_pyglet_visual_client.py`** (batching, viewport flip, Retina sizing) before concluding ‚ÄúPyglet does not render.‚Äù
- **Arcade contingency (user policy, 2026-04-14):** After POC vs full-client bisect, if Pyglet still cannot be **window-verified** on the host, a bounded **`arcade`** spike under **`scripts/`** (optional extra + import fences) is the preferred next experiment before changing the phased primary visual path; promote Arcade only via ADR/reporter if it wins.
- **Phase 55 / Slice B:** **`client.terrain_tile_grid`** maps **`terrain_window`** to **`(x_px, y_px, w_px, h_px, r, g, b)`** with **RGB 0..255**; iterate tiles in list order (same row-major contract as **`world_snapshot._build_terrain_window`**); reuse **`terrain_tiles`** float fallbacks for colors.
- **Phase 57 / Slice G (Pyglet perf sampling):** **`scripts/run_pyglet_visual_client.py`** CONFIG **`pyglet_perf_*`** ‚Äî warmup + **N** sampled **`on_draw`** wall times, terrain/marker rect counts, optional JSON write (**`mythosunwritten.pyglet_perf_slice_g_v0`**) then **`pyglet.app.exit()`** for bounded runs; offline **`tests/test_run_pyglet_visual_client_config.py`** (**`test_write_pyglet_perf_slice_g_metrics_json`**, wiring guard). Evidence: **`reports/phase57_slice_g_metrics.json`** + **`reports/phase57_slice_g_experiment.md`**.
- **Phase 55 / Slice C:** **`scripts/run_pyglet_visual_client.py`** keeps **`import pyglet`** inside **`main()`**; tile rects from **`build_terrain_window_tile_rects`** use top-left +y-down ‚Äî flip with **`viewport_h - y_top - h`** before **`shapes.Rectangle`** (Pyglet bottom-left origin).
- **Phase 60 / Slice B:** Pointer hit-test lives in **`client.terrain_window_pyglet_hit`** (no Pyglet import). Row from window **`y`** uses **`j = (vh - floor(y) - 1) // cell_h`** then half-open **`[yb, yb+cell_h)`** against the same **`yb`** as drawing ‚Äî not **`y // cell_h`** (wrong axis sense). Undrawn viewport margins from integer division tile sizing (**`vw // tw`**, **`vh // th`**) return **`None`**.
- **Phase 60 / Slice C:** **`run_pyglet_visual_client`** stores last pointer **(x,y)** in **`on_mouse_motion`** and recomputes **`hit_terrain_window_cell_from_pyglet_window_xy`** each **`on_draw`** with the **current** snapshot + **`window.get_size()`** so HUD / **`debug_hover_tile_rect`** outline stay aligned with the frame being drawn (not a stale **`terrain_window`** from an earlier tick).
- **Phase 60 / Slice D:** Click-to-move resolves at **start** of **`on_draw`** using the **previous** frame's **`terrain_window`** plus **press-time** **`window.get_size()`** so the picked cell matches what was on screen when the user clicked; **`cardinal_step_delta_if_adjacent`** restricts to one orthogonal step (same step family as single-key WASD).
- **Phase 55 / framebuffer readback:** On some Darwin runs, **`one_shot_framebuffer_png`** decode matched **clear** only while offline **`terrain_tile_grid`** rects showed multiple RGBs (same pattern as **`run_pyglet_visual_poc.py`**); treat default-buffer **`save()`** as **environment-dependent** window-truth ‚Äî **pytest** + offline rect stats remain the CI gate (**`reports/phase55_pyglet_visual_client_experiment.md`**).
- **Pyglet 1.x vs 2.x main loop:** **`pyglet.app.run(interval=‚Ä¶)`** is **Pyglet 2+** only. Conda **base** or other envs may still ship **Pyglet 1.x** ‚Üí **`TypeError: unexpected keyword argument 'interval'`**. Scripts **`run_pyglet_visual_client.py`** / **`run_pyglet_visual_poc.py`** branch on **`inspect.signature(pyglet.app.run)`** and use **`pyglet.clock.schedule_interval`** + **`window.invalidate()`** when needed; prefer **`uv run`** / **`[pyglet_visual]`** so versions match **`pyproject.toml`**.
- Some automated / constrained GL contexts log **GLSL `#version 130/140` not supported** while the app still enters the render loop; on desktop the same log line can indicate a **user-visible** regression (above) until shaders are upgraded or the GL profile is adjusted.
- macOS: `CocoaGraphicsPipe`, window position, `iCCP` PNG warnings without a Python traceback usually mean normal startup ‚Äî look for tracebacks or hangs for real failures (`reports/phase11_visual_smoke_experiment.md`).
- Multi-local: `local_players`, `client.local_player_bindings`, `player_may_dispatch`; advance prev-key state for chords every frame (Phase 11 Slice I reviewer).
- Freeform HUD (Phase 29): `format_freeform_ability_hud_line` Ursina-free; config in `scripts/run_visual_client.py`.

## Combat and world

- After `prune_dead_combatants_or_close`, reindex `turn_ptr` before `close_combat` so `current_actor_id` stays valid on elimination.
- Chunk index math uses floor division for negative `wx` (documented in overworld tests).

## Events and goldens

- Prefer structured `World.events` over string `lines` for assertions.
- Assert short full-record slices (seq, tick, type, payload) when stable.
- **Phase 73:** `World.pending_trades` is the authoritative FIFO queue (cap `PENDING_TRADES_MAX` in `sim.constants`); `World.pending_trade` is a compatibility property for the oldest row. `build_client_world_snapshot` always includes `pending_trades` (deep-copied list) and `pending_trade` when non-empty; Pyglet accept/deny scan FIFO rows for the local player‚Äôs actionable trade.
- **Phase 74 Slice B:** `CharacterSheet.gold` (non-negative int, default `0`). `propose_trade` / `accept_trade` optional `give_gold` / `want_gold` (reject `bool` masquerading as `int`). Pending rows and `trade_proposed` / `trade_accepted` / voluntary `trade_denied` / tick `trade_expired` payloads include `give_gold` / `want_gold` keys only when non-zero so pure-barter goldens match Phase 73 dict equality.
- **Phase 74 Slice C:** `agents/structured_action_json` validates optional trade gold on `propose_trade` the same way as `dispatch_action`. `run_headless` optional `headless_demo_hero_gold` / `headless_demo_npc_gold` (single-local) and `headless_return_entity_gold` return key for harness final-balance asserts; vertical stub docstring points to `tests/test_vertical_play_stub_npc_trade_currency_phase74.py` + subprocess `httpx` / `mythosunwritten.llm` fence.
- **Phase 74 Slice D:** `build_client_world_snapshot` adds per-entity `gold` and deep-copies pending rows (sim already omits zero gold keys). `trade_hud_format` appends ` +Ng` after item ids in pending lines (leading space) and tight `+Ng` after ids in `trade_proposed` / `trade_accepted` event lines; `show_trade_currency` gates HUD + events. Pyglet: `pyglet_trade_hud_currency_enabled`, optional `pyglet_trade_propose_{give,want}_gold`, `pyglet_demo_entity_gold` map after `build_visual_demo_world`.
- **Phase 75 (design spike ‚Äî closed 2026-04-15):** **Design 1** only ‚Äî counterparty in-place row revision (same **`trade_id`**) + additive **`trade_revised`** (name frozen); **`propose_trade`** opens new ids; **`accept_trade`** sole atomic commit (**Phase 74**); **refresh `expires_at_tick`** on successful revision when expiry enabled; **Design 3** deferred, **Design 2** reserved. ADR **¬ß Reviewer** + **¬ß Reporter**; closure **`reports/phase75_trade_counter_offer_design_spike_v0.md`**. Implementation landed **Phase 76** (**closed 2026-04-15**).
- **Phase 76 (closed 2026-04-15):** `revise_trade` / `trade_revised` per Phase 75 freeze ‚Äî dispatcher (counterparty-only `to_entity_id`, optional gold, `trade_terms_unchanged`, refresh `expires_at_tick` when timeout on), `structured_action_json`, `run_headless` hooks, vertical stub `tests/test_vertical_play_stub_npc_trade_revise_phase76.py`, `trade_hud_format` + Pyglet CONFIG (`format_trade_revised_event_line`, revise hints, `build_revise_trade_payload`). Closure `reports/phase76_trade_revised_implementation_v0.md`; pytest **657** passed (standard deselect, `e89112f`).
- **Phase 77 (closed 2026-04-15):** Restored `run_pyglet_visual_client.main()` terrain `Batch` + `pyglet_viewport_diagnostic_*` + Pyglet 1.x `app.run` fallback; Slice D evidence: `pyglet_slice_d_evidence_*`, `scripts/run_phase77_slice_d_evidence.py`, `reports/phase77_slice_d_viewport_evidence.md`. **Pitfall:** in `on_draw`, do not use local name `cb` for the color-buffer object when `glClearColor(cr, cg, cb, ca)` uses `cb` as blue ‚Äî `UnboundLocalError`; use e.g. `color_buffer`. Closure `reports/phase77_pyglet_full_client_viewport_v0.md`; pytest **667** passed (standard deselect, `e89112f`).
- **Phase 78 (closed 2026-04-15):** `build_npc_observation` ‚Äî `=== trades ===` (`pending_trades` + capped `recent_trade_events`), exploration `=== legality_hint ===` trade + `revise_trade` cues; `ObservationLimits.max_pending_trades_shown`; `npc_system.md` + prompt skeleton anchors. Closure `reports/phase78_npc_observation_trade_revise_parity_v0.md`; pytest **672** passed (standard deselect).
- **Phase 79‚Äì80 (ground / click `pick_up`):** `World.ground_items` tile stacks; snapshot `ground_tiles` with sorted `stacks` + caps (`CLIENT_SNAPSHOT_GROUND_*` in `sim.constants`). `pyglet_free_ground_loot_hud` + optional markers on `run_pyglet_visual_client.py`. **`pick_up_top_item_id`** = sim stack top (last list entry) ‚Äî do not infer default `pick_up` `item_id` from `stacks[0]` alone. Click pick-up: previous-frame `terrain_window` + press-time `get_size()`, `terrain_window_pyglet_hit` world-tile mapping. Closures `reports/phase79_*`, `phase80_*`.
- **Phase 81‚Äì84 (trade revise / drop / give):** Vertical stub LLM overlays + subprocess fences (`phase81`, `phase84`); Pyglet rising-edge `drop_item` / `give_item` (`pyglet_drop_item_*`, `pyglet_give_item_*`); `on_draw` **`drop_item` then `give_item`**; default keys **`g`** vs **`x`**. Closures `reports/phase81_*` ‚Ä¶ `phase84_*`.
- **Phase 85‚Äì87 (examine + observation parity):** Pyglet `examine` default **`e`**, same target family as `give_item`; `examine_hud_format`. Vertical stub `examine` LLM harness mirrors `give_item` fence. Observation: `entity_examined` tail + `examine:` legality; combat `legality_hint` may omit `examine:` line (test contract). Closures `phase85`‚Äì`phase87`.
- **Phase 88‚Äì89 (`wait`/`say`, `interact`):** Observation tails + `legality_hint` vs dispatcher; `interact` / `entity_interacted` parity ‚Äî encounter hint omits `interact:` payload line where frozen. Closures `phase88`, `phase89`.

## Environment

- Validate `environment.yml` with `conda env create -f environment.yml -n mythosunwritten --dry-run` before recommending env creation.
